Liability Waivers

All passengers must sign a waiver before boarding. Download the correct form below, sign it, and bring it with you or email it to Captain Drew before your trip.

Questions? Email CaptainDrew@badcastcharters.com

👤

Adult Waiver

Required for all passengers 18 years of age and older. Read carefully before signing. Covers all charter activities on M/V Badcast.

Download Adult Waiver
👪

Minor Waiver

Required for any passenger under 18 years of age. Must be signed by a parent or legal guardian. Covers all charter activities on M/V Badcast.

Download Minor Waiver

Signed waivers can be emailed to CaptainDrew@badcastcharters.com before your trip, or brought with you on the day of your charter. Captain Drew will confirm receipt.

© 2026 Bad Cast Charters · Brunswick, Maine

Some species may be subject to size and bag limits or require special tags. Guests are responsible for knowing applicable regulations. Captain Drew will advise before your trip.
